content.en:
Since the eternal end of the Origin Realm Sea has passed, the cultivation environment has been very good, and this can be regarded as one of the benefits.

Of course, if it weren't for Ye Tian's existence, the Origin Realm Sea would have fallen long ago.

Not long after, Ye Tian's body on this side of the Origin Realm Sea also had the same cultivation as the copied body.

Before you know it, another 100,000 eternal years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was in the middle of cultivation, and his gaze suddenly looked through the infinite territory and looked at somewhere at the end of the realm.

"Bai Guyuan is shocked, is that guy coming out?"

Ye Tian muttered.

Ever since he knew that there was a sleeping perfect controller in the White Bone Abyss, Ye Tian had left an avatar to monitor the White Bone Abyss from a distance, after all, the White Bone Abyss was too close to the Origin Realm Sea.

Perhaps for a Ten Realm-level master, this is an incomparably long distance, but for a perfect master, this distance is nothing at all.

Therefore, Ye Tian must pay attention to the perfect controller of Bai Guyuan.

Now, Bai Guyuan was shaken, and the aura of the perfect controller appeared, which meant that the other party was about to wake up.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian also gained a lot of benefits from the other party, so as long as the other party was not hostile, he would not react.

......

White Bone Abyss.

This treasure land trembled violently, and soon began to crack and collapse.

In a short time, a terrifying aura disturbed the surrounding time and space.

Then, a figure walked out from the depths of the White Bone Abyss.

This was a young man, his body exuding a crimson golden light, and his aura far surpassed that of a half-step perfect controller.

However, he didn't find Ye Tian's incarnation.

After all, Ye Tian has too many perfect-level ancestors to hide himself, and there are many means, and now he is a little far away, and under the full concealment, if this perfect controller does not pay attention, he will naturally not be able to find Ye Tian.

Wow!

The young man moved quickly, and in the blink of an eye, he came to the Origin Realm Sea.

"This Eternal Heaven and Earth is still there! According to the time, this place should have experienced the last years of eternity not long ago, and this eternal world actually blocked the catastrophe of the last years of eternity?"

The young man was a little surprised.

The area where the Origin Realm Sea is located is not a prosperous place at the end of the realm, and there are not many resources here, so the eternal world born here does not have all the resources, and it is too difficult to become a perfect controller.

"I thought that this place was occupied by creatures at the end of the realm and was about to collapse, and I wanted to take away some eternal origin materials to restore my strength, but it seems that there is no hope. The young man muttered.

Suddenly, he felt a gaze.

"Who?"

The young man said solemnly.

Airplanes!

A figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

When the young man saw Ye Tian, his expression changed, "How is it possible to create a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm?"

What kind of place is the Origin Realm Sea, how could a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm be born, this is too nonsense!

There was only one reason, and that was that Ye Tian was not from the Origin Realm Sea.

"What do you call Your Excellency, you must not be a cultivator of this eternal heaven and earth, right?"

The youth said.

Ye Tian smiled slightly and said, "Wudao Tower Ye Tian, however, I do belong to this Eternal Heaven and Earth, but I just happened to have been to the Ruins of Eternity and joined the Wudao Tower." "

"The ruins of eternity, the Tower of No Dao, so it is. "

The young man suddenly realized, no wonder the Origin Realm Sea had passed the end of eternity, and with a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm in charge, the Origin Realm Sea would naturally be safe and sound.

"Loose cultivation, Mo Chen. "

The young man briefly introduced himself.

After chatting with Mochen, Ye Tian knew a little about the other party.

Mo Chen had been to the Ruins of Eternity, but he was not a cultivator of the Ruins of Eternity, like Ye Tian, he also came from an Eternal Heaven and Earth, and that Eternal Heaven and Earth was much stronger than the Origin Realm Sea, and had many perfect controllers, but it was far inferior to the Ruins of Eternity.

As for more information, Ye Tian is not clear, and it is impossible for the other party to disclose it.

Ye Tian originally thought that Mo Chen would leave after staying here for a long time, but the other party stayed nearby, practicing silently and recovering his strength.

After all, the other party has just woken up, and his strength has not fully recovered.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Mochen finally fully recovered.

this day.

Mochen came to find Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, I have a great deed, I came to you to cooperate. "

Mochen said.

"Great thing, cooperation?"

Ye Tian was a little vigilant in his heart, after all, he didn't have any friendship with Mo Chen, if there was a big thing, why didn't Mo Chen find his old friend, he didn't believe that Mo Chen had been a perfect controller for so long, and there were few perfect controller friends?

So, Ye Tian asked: "Mochen, you are a perfect controller, looking for me, an unfamiliar half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm?

Mochen smiled bitterly and said, "To be honest, I offended a huge force in my hometown, so I didn't dare to go back." As for the perfect master of the Eternal Ruins, I'm not familiar with it either, and I've only been there a few times. Moreover, I have been asleep for so long and who knows what happened. Instead of going back to find a partner, it is better to cooperate with Ye Tianyou directly here. "

"What cooperation?" Ye Tian asked.

Of course, he didn't really believe Mochen's words, but he was just curious why Mochen asked him to cooperate?

Mo Chen revealed: "Actually, I found a treasure land at the beginning, but my strength alone was limited, so I was hit hard, and my will clone also fell, so I had no choice but to sleep and recover my strength." If I go again, it's still very dangerous, and I still won't be able to save my life if I go with my will. That's why I need someone to work with. "

"If it's that dangerous, it won't help me to go!"

Ye Tian said.

Mo Chen smiled and said: "Don't worry, in fact, I only almost succeeded, if you are added, I can succeed 100%." Moreover, there is an Extreme Creation Material in that place, and what you half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm need most is the Extreme Creation Material. I can assure you that all the materials you have obtained will belong to you. Moreover, for other benefits, we are also divided into four and six, I am six, you are four, how about it?"

"Is there a pole-making substance?"

Ye Tian was a little moved.

After all, if he had a large enough amount of pole-making substance, he could break the third pole-making chain in a short period of time, and thus his strength would increase greatly.

So, after Ye Tian learned about that treasure land, he finally agreed.

Subsequently.

Mo Chen asked Ye Tian to prepare, and he also had to reunite his will clone and agree to go to that treasure land after ten eternal years.

......

"Mo Chen, this person, can't be completely believed, maybe he wants to find a substitute ghost. I have a total of three true bodies, and I can keep a copy body on the side of the Eternal Ruins, and re-condense a copy body on this side of the Origin Realm Sea, so that the copy body and the will can be separated, and my body is still immovable. If something really goes wrong, it doesn't matter if the copy body and the will doppelganger falls. If Mochen dares to pit me, then he will regret it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He annihilated himself a replica body in the ruins of eternity, and the ontology on this side of the Origin Realm Sea began to condense the replicating body, and after the replicating body condensed, the replicating body condensed and then condensed the will clone.

It wasn't long before everything was ready.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body and will clone converged with Mo Chen and headed to that special treasure land.
